new_javadoc:
/** * Whether the {@link AbstractReflection} subclass will call {@link AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) AccessibleObject#setAccessible(true)} on * inaccessible fields. *

* In general, controls whether the instances built by this builder will force the accessible flag for reflection. *

*

* Defaults to {@code getForceAccessible()}, which defaults to true for compatibility. *

*

* This default is read from the system property {@code "AbstractReflection.forceAccessible"}, which defaults to true for compatibility. *

*

* The parsing rules are as {@link Boolean#parseBoolean(String)}. *

*

* See subclassses for specific behavior. *

* * @param forceAccessible Whether to force accessibility by calling {@link AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) * AccessibleObject#setAccessible(true)}. * @return {@code this} instance. * @see AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java @@ -0,0 +65,31 @@ + return (B) this; + } + + /** + * Whether the {@link AbstractReflection} subclass will call {@link AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) AccessibleObject#setAccessible(true)} on + * inaccessible fields. + *

+ * In general, controls whether the instances built by this builder will force the accessible flag for reflection. + *

+ *

+ * Defaults to {@code getForceAccessible()}, which defaults to true for compatibility. + *

+ *

+ * This default is read from the system property {@code "AbstractReflection.forceAccessible"}, which defaults to true for compatibility. + *

+ *

+ * The parsing rules are as {@link Boolean#parseBoolean(String)}. + *

+ *

+ * See subclassses for specific behavior. + *

+ * + * @param forceAccessible Whether to force accessibility by calling {@link AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) + * AccessibleObject#setAccessible(true)}. + * @return {@code this} instance. + * @see AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) + */ + public B setForceAccessible(final boolean forceAccessible) { + this.forceAccessible = forceAccessible; + return asThis(); + }
